amount.business_reasoning: Median purchase amount is representative of typical transaction. Mean would be skewed by high-value outliers. Maintains distribution integrity.
amount.risk_assessment: Low - median is stable metric resistant to outliers

email.business_reasoning: Email is critical for customer contact and marketing campaigns. Rows without email cannot be used for outreach. Data is incomplete.
email.risk_assessment: Low - only affects small percentage of data

name.business_reasoning: Column-specific handling applied based on available data and workflow rules.
